title: neopreissia cinerea
intro: Neopreissia cinerea, also known as Cinerea or White Woodruff, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Neopreissia cinerea include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
